title: Buttery Crispy Midnight Banana Dip
description: A delicious and satisfying dessert dish that satisfies the midnight craving for ripe bananas with a crispy exterior and buttery interior, perfect for a midday snack or late-night treat.

ingredients.name: butter
ingredients.amount: 8 ounces, melted and cooled to room temperature

instructions: In a large bowl, mix the flour and baking powder together.
Stir in the cooled melted butter, honey or maple syrup, vanilla extract, and a pinch of salt until well combined.
Fold in the sliced ripe bananas gently but thoroughly until all are evenly coated with the batter mixture.

Line a baking sheet with parchment paper. Scoop the banana mixture into 6-7 small round molds to form crispy bites. Alternatively, pour the mixture onto the prepared baking sheet in a single layer for a dip-like consistency.
Bake for about 25 minutes or until golden brown and crisp on the outside.
Remove from oven and allow to cool slightly before serving.
